query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `popup_registrations` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `eventSlug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `customerName` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `customerEmail` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  `customerPhone` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `eventType` enum('dinner','masterclass') NOT NULL,
  `selectedDate` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `numberOfGuests` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `specialRequirements` text,
  `status` enum('registered','confirmed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'registered',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `popup_registrations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `popup_registrations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
